message.entry: Right hand side must be a column vector.
Right hand side must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer}.
Preconditioner must be a square matrix of size {0,number,integer}
Initial guess must be a column vector of length {0,number,integer}.
Input tol may not be achievable by LSQR\n Try to use a bigger tolerance
Input tol is bigger than 1 \n Try to use a smaller tolerance
